subject: Fix deployment of vfc-ztevnfmdriver
commit_message:
Fix deployment of vfc-ztevnfmdriver

Change-Id: I043d3eeb3c4f30bce7ac6c0362b508bcffc3dd2b
Issue-ID: OOM-782
Signed-off-by: BorislavG <Borislav.Glozman@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

In master branch, we already changed the image name of zte vnfm driver to vfc-ztevnfmdriver.You can see the build_image.sh in the directory \svnfm\zte\vmanager\docker.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Borislav, the reason I changed this in your one namespace patch is because it was wrong. So it's still wrong here. As mentioned as comment, the name as changed a little long ago.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1 -Verified

> Borislav, the reason I changed this in your one namespace patch is
 > because it was wrong. So it's still wrong here. As mentioned as
 > comment, the name as changed a little long ago.

Sorry, must have missed that. Abandoning.
BTW, with this image the healthcheck passes...
Do you know what is the right name / tag of the image?
Is there a bug on vfc to fix this?
